seoTitle: How to Set Up Affiliate Marketing for Gumroad Products
metaDescription: Learn how to enable an affiliate program on Gumroad, set commission rates, and invite partners to promote your digital products.
intro: Affiliate marketing lets other people promote your Gumroad products in exchange for a commission, which can extend your reach without extra ad spend. This guide covers enabling the affiliate program, setting commission rates, and inviting partners to start promoting your listings.

steps.heading: Open your affiliate settings
steps.body: Go to your Gumroad profile settings and find the section for affiliate program management.

steps.heading: Choose eligible products
steps.body: Decide which products you want affiliates to be able to promote.

steps.heading: Set your commission rate
steps.body: Choose the percentage split you're willing to pay affiliates for each sale they generate.

steps.heading: Invite affiliates
steps.body: Add a partner's email or share your public affiliate signup link to bring on new promoters.

steps.heading: Track performance
steps.body: Monitor your affiliate dashboard to see referred sales and payout activity over time.

faq.question: How much commission can I offer affiliates on Gumroad?
faq.answer: You set the commission percentage yourself when configuring the affiliate program for your products.

faq.question: Can I choose which products are open to affiliates?
faq.answer: Yes, you can enable individual products for the affiliate program rather than your entire catalog.

faq.question: How do affiliates get their referral link?
faq.answer: Once added, affiliates typically receive a unique referral link they can use to promote your product.

faq.question: How do I track how much an affiliate has sold?
faq.answer: Gumroad's affiliate dashboard shows referred sales and commission totals for each partner.
